The pack includes a mix of 6 vibrant neon colours, ensuring a variety of bright and vivid flashing glasses for any party. Are batteries included with the Party Flashing Glasses? Yes, each pair of Party Flashing Glasses comes with batteries included, so they are ready to use right out of the box. What occasions are these LED glasses suitable for? These glasses are perfect for neon parties, disco dance parties, birthdays, Christmas, Halloween, dress-up parties, university freshers parties, and Saturday night events. How do the flashing glasses get the party started? The flashing lights and vibrant colours of the glasses boost the mood and energy level of any event, creating a festive and upbeat atmosphere. Are the Party Flashing Glasses durable? Yes, these glasses are made from high-quality plastic materials, ensuring they are durable and can withstand the fun and excitement of any party.
